items.title: Luke Kennard is proud of the way the #Lakers came together in the playoffs.

Luke Kennard is proud of the way the #Lakers came together in the playoffs.

media.title: Luke Kennard explains being proud of Lakers
media.description: Luke Kennard called this Los Angeles Lakers team a special group and is proud of how they came together after the injuries.
